assessment.note: Names a specific aspiration to lead one cross-team decision end to end, which shows direction and ambition but not a wellbeing signal. [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'lead one cross-team decision' could be drilled next session.

new_queue.label: Execution bias
new_queue.name: What do you think pulls you toward execution over influence in the moment?
new_queue.description: Explores whether the pattern is habit, context, or a deliberate tradeoff.

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we’ve covered, what is the one change you want to make first?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete priority and commitment from the conversation.
